title: Safe to stop. Safe to switch off.
subtitle: A two-part energy statement for releasing vigilance and allowing rest to feel safe.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 18 of the SLEEP program. Two moves: release the belief that something will go wrong if you stop watching, then allow rest as safe and complete.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 18 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Safe to switch off."

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 18 of the SLEEP program. Two moves: release the vigil, then allow rest as complete and safe.
I release the belief that things will go wrong if I stop watching. I release the role of night watch. I let go of the habit of staying 'on' when rest is what I need.
I allow rest to feel safe. I allow switching off to be complete. It is safe to stop. It is safe to switch off.
Read the release statement slowly, then pause. Read the allow statement and let the words land.
Adapted from Day 18 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
